description: Microsoft Word is open with 'patent_license_draft_tracked.docx', a patent license agreement between BioSynthetics Corporation and MedTech Innovations LLC. As a paralegal at Morrison & Foerster LLP, finalize this agreement by accepting all tracked changes from attorneys J. Morrison and R. Chen. Insert at least two footnotes at legally appropriate locations containing relevant patent-law citations. Save the finalized agreement as 'patent_license_final.docx' in the Desktop\WordTasks folder.
